case_title: LILA BAKER REEDY VS. MUNEZHAH OPEYANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REEDY, LILA BAKER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OPEYANY, MUNEZHAH $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,710.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY REEDY, LILA BAKER AS TO DEFENDANT OPEYANY, MUNEZHAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -- (SERVICE FEE: $35.00) SERVED APR-30-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OPEYANY, MUNEZHAH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2016 - JUDGMENT.
